context: Evaluates database migration safety: avoiding table locks on large tables, phased rollout strategy, and batch backfilling.

checklist.name: Avoids Table Rewrite Lock
checklist.description: Does NOT attempt to add a NOT NULL column with a default in a single migration step.

checklist.name: Phased Rollout Strategy
checklist.description: Plans a multi-step process: add column (nullable) -> backfill -> add constraint.

checklist.name: Batch Backfilling
checklist.description: Provides a backfill script that uses batches (e.g., in_batches or find_in_batches) to avoid memory bloat/long transactions.

checklist.name: Safe Constraint Addition
checklist.description: Uses a safe method to add the NOT NULL constraint (e.g., using `validate: false` then `validate_constraint` in Postgres if applicable).

checklist.name: Safety Rationale
checklist.description: Correctly explains the risk of exclusive locks on large tables during DDL operations.
